title: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation expand athlete sponsorship initiative
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation expanded its CSR collaboration with GoSports Foundation by broadening the 'Girls for Gold' high-performance sports initiative into 'Gear for Gold.' The program will support male, female, and para-athletes across six sporting disciplines through academy-based development. The release does not disclose any financial commitment or material business impact for Infosys.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with GoSports Foundation to transform 'Girls for Gold' into the broader and more inclusive 'Gear for Gold.'
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

key_facts.fact: The 'Gear for Gold' program will support male, female, and para-athletes across badminton, table tennis, weightlifting, boxing, athletics, and shooting.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

key_facts.fact: Since their collaboration in 2022, Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation have supported five academies across India, and from this year the expanded program will support three new academies.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation expanded its CSR collaboration with GoSports Foundation through the 'Gear for Gold' athlete sponsorship initiative.
esg_or_csr_items.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

important_text_spans.text: Infosys Foundation, the philanthropic and CSR arm of Infosys, today announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with GoSports Foundation.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative
important_text_spans.reason: Supports classification of the event as a CSR collaboration rather than a commercial deal.

important_text_spans.text: The 'Gear for Gold' program will focus on six sporting disciplines: badminton, table tennis, weightlifting, boxing, athletics, and shooting.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the scope of the expanded athlete sponsorship program.
